'''Politrix''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] who lived during the last [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. After being raised at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], she reached the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]]. Two [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|beginning]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Politrix was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by a [[Plasma grenade/Legends|plasma grenade]] during a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederate]] ambush.

==Biography==
Politrix was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who lived in the final [[Standard year/Legends|years]]<ref name="DR" /> of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]<ref name="CSWE 363">{{CSWECite|I|363|Great Peace of the Republic}}</ref> Raised at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] after having been discovered to be sensitive to [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], Politrix was a contemporary of fellow [[Jedi academy|academy]] [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|initiates]] [[Jang Li-Li]] and [[Jai Maruk]]. During their [[Time/Legends|time]] at the Temple, Politrix and Maruk harbored secret feelings for each other, but they stayed true to the [[Jedi Code/Legends|Jedi Code]], and their relationship never blossomed. Eventually, Politrix achieved the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] after completing her [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]].<ref name="DR" />

When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|erupted]] between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] on the planet [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]]<ref name="DR" /> in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="TNEC" /> Politrix received the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] within the newly-formed [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. Two [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the start of the war, Politrix was leading [[Trooper/Legends|troops]] against the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]] when she was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by a [[Plasma grenade/Legends|plasma grenade]] during an ambush. Maruk remembered his dead friend nearly [[19 BBY/Legends|three years later]] on a [[Mission to Vjun (Clone Wars)|mission]] to [[Vjun/Legends|Vjun]].<ref name="DR" />

==Personality and traits==
Politrix was an athletic Human female with [[Color/Legends|red]] [[Hair/Legends|curls]]. Fellow [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Jai Maruk considered her to be very attractive. She possessed the skills to become a Jedi Knight but was nevertheless killed early in the Clone Wars.<ref name="DR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Politrix was first mentioned in ''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'', a novel written by [[Sean Stewart]] and published in [[2004]].<ref name="DR" />
